## Excerpt (first 6 000 chars, docx)

__Date:__ 17th March 2026

Dear ………\.

__Ref: Invitation – Zimbabwe 2\.0: AI for National Transformation Summit 2026 & AI Tech Forum 2026__

I trust you are well\.

We are pleased to invite you to participate in the AI Tech Forum 2026, taking place 27–28 March 2026 at Montclair Hotel, Nyanga, Zimbabwe, under the theme: “Engineering the Future: Mastering Next\-Generation AI Systems in Practice at Scale\.”

This will be followed by the Zimbabwe 2\.0: AI for National Transformation Summit, scheduled for 28–29 May 2026 at the same venue, under the theme: “Leveraging AI for Innovation, Policy, and Inclusive National Development\.”

Hosted by the Artificial Intelligence Institute Africa \(AIIA\) in partnership with Zimpapers, these events will bring together leading AI experts, policymakers, industry leaders, and innovators to shape the future of AI and national development\.

Please find attached the summit program and sponsorship packages for your review\.

For further information, please contact: 

AI Institute Africa: \+263 78 693 7025    ,    Mica Zinduru:\+263 77 233 1156

We look forward to your participation in what promises to be a landmark conversation on AI and national transformation\.

Yours sincerely,
